seoTitle: Numbaa vs Number One — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Numbaa and Number One. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Numbaa vs Number One: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Numbaa and Number One.
heading: Numbaa vs Number One — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Numbaa, New South Wales and Number One, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Number One has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Numbaa (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Numbaa or Number One safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Numbaa has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Number One scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Numbaa scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Number One scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Numbaa or Number One?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Number One has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
